titleStmt.title: SII 9.88: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 88. (A.R. No. 518 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT CHIMNAHALLI, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Śaka 956, Śukla, Pushya, śu. 5, Ādivāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. The date is irregular. Śaka 956, which is clear on the impression, was Bhāva = A.D. 1034-35. The record refers-itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Jagadēkamalladēva and mentions his feudatory Jagadēkamalla-Noḷambapallava-Permānaḍi as ruling Kadaṁbaḷige thousand, Kōgaḷi five-hundred, Ballakunde three-hundred, Kudiharadi seventy and Kariviḍi thirty. It records that the Manevergaḍe Kētaya-Nāyaka, ruling over Nelkudure, made a grant of some plots of land and some contributon of grains per year for the service of the god Kalidēva. The characters of the record are of a period much later than the one to which it purports to belong.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ . mahārājādhi
rājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷati
ḷakaṁ cāḷukyabharaṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvara vija
yarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrā
rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . svasti samādhigatapañcamahā
sabda pallavānvayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ pallavakuḷatiḷaka(ṁ) namō
ghavākyaṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalla
noḷaṁbapallavapermānaḷidēvaru kadaṁbaḷiga sāyirau
kōgaḷiyaynūṟuṁ ballakuṁde mūnūṟuṁ kudiharadi Eppa
ttu kariviḍi mūvattu māsavāḍināḍoḷagaṇa bhattagāva
paṁcagrāmamumaṁ duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapratipāḷanaṁge
ydāḷuttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷappa manevergaḍe
kēteyanāyaka nelkudurayanāḷuttumire
sakavarṣa 956 neya suklasaṁvatsaraṁ pravarttise puṣya suddha paṁcami
Ādivāramuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntiyaṁdu nelkudureya
kalidēvargge kēteyanāyakaṁ duggarājapaṁḍitara kālaṁ
karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭa keI so(ṁ)nnada dā
riIṁdaṁ mūḍalu huṇaseya keyi matta 4 māciya
haḷḷada haraḷu matta 4 rakkasiya koḷada haraḷu matta 1
IruvāḷakeI matta 2 kaḍeyaholada mugguḍeya
keI matta 2 mallikabbeya kaṭṭeyiṁ paḍuval matta 2
hagaredaḍi hūdōṭa matta 1 Adaṟoḷage mūlastā
nadēvarige matta 3 kalidēvara nandādīvigege gāṇa 1 dēva
goḷaga damagoḷagavaṁ dhānyadali kuḷavaṁ kēteyanāyaka
nu Aṟuvatokalumirddu koṭṭaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti masuṁdharāṁ . śaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭi
rjāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.88 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
